settings.heading: Better files create better prints.
settings.text: Use this guide to prepare designs for apparel, posters, stickers, mugs, packaging, and business print products.

settings.question: Use high resolution
settings.answer: Upload the largest clean version of your design. For most print products, 300 DPI artwork is preferred when available.

settings.question: Transparent backgrounds help apparel
settings.answer: For T-shirts and hoodies, transparent PNG files usually print cleaner than designs placed on a solid square background.

settings.question: Avoid tiny text
settings.answer: Small text and fine lines may not print clearly on fabric. Keep lettering bold and readable from a distance.

settings.question: Check spelling before upload
settings.answer: Custom products are printed from the submitted artwork. Review spelling, dates, names, and phone numbers carefully.

settings.heading: A simple checklist before upload.
settings.text: These guidelines reduce delays and help customers understand what makes a design suitable for production.
